===={{aniseries|DP}}====
In ''[[DP076|A Full Course Tag Battle!]]'', it was revealed in a flashback that Drew's Roselia had [[Evolution|evolved]] into a {{TP|Drew|Roserade}}. May also revealed that Drew was still a major adversary during her journey in Johto.

Drew made cameo appearances with Harley and Solidad in ''[[DP077|Staging a Heroes' Welcome!]]'' and ''[[DP079|Strategy with a Smile!]]'', where they were at [[Ecruteak City]], watching May live on [[Television|TV]] as she competed in the [[Wallace Cup]].
[[File:Hoenn Rivals.png|250px|thumb|Drew in ''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]'']]
